name: roomer
description: ## Purpose: The newcomers in various cities of India don’t have contacts when they arrive and as a result, have difficulty finding roommates to stay at shared rentals at affordable pricing. This issue is faced by professionals and students alike.  We aim to simplify the process of finding roommates.

scripts.setup: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ..
scripts.build-run: cd client && npm run build && cd .. && node server.js
scripts.heroku-postbuild: cd client && npm install && npm run build

author: Yashvardhan
